title: [merge-conflict] worktree-worker24: Kconfig
close_reason: Resolved Kconfig merge conflicts by removing duplicate LICHEN_ADAPTIVE_SF_ENABLED, LICHEN_DEFAULT_SF, and LICHEN_DUTY_CYCLE definitions from subsystem Kconfigs (link, hal, l2); consolidated in top-level lichen/Kconfig with consistent style. Fixed whitespace/indentation inconsistencies across multiple Kconfig and Kconfig.defconfig files from parallel worker edits. Verified with git status/diff. Commit 1fbaabe13.
